title: Wave-based parallel execution with specialist casting

tasks.title: Evaluate CC agent teams vs CLI spawns vs Agent tool for parallel builds

dod.criterion: Agent teams (CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS) tested with a real parallel build scenario
/batch command tested for large-scale file changes
Comparison doc: agent teams vs CLI spawns vs Agent tool background — capabilities, limitations, when to use each
Recommendation for which primitive the pipeline should use for parallel task execution

tasks.title: Add depends_on and touches_files_hint to Morgan's output schema

dod.criterion: morgan-plan.md schema includes depends_on[] (optional, default []) per project
morgan-plan.md schema includes touches_files_hint[] (optional) per project
morgan-prompt.md includes parallel execution guidance and specialist casting rules
Example in morgan-plan.md shows depends_on usage for parallel vs sequential tasks

tasks.title: Implement wave analysis algorithm in execution doc

dod.criterion: 09-execute-projects.md documents the greedy wave computation algorithm
Algorithm inputs: tasks[] with depends_on, audit active_files per task
Algorithm respects: priority tiers, explicit dependencies, file overlap
Max 3 parallel tasks per wave (tunable MAX_PARALLEL)
Global sequential files list documented (package.json, tsconfig.json, prisma/schema.prisma)
Wave manifest artifact spec (wave-manifest.json) documented

tasks.title: Update execution doc for parallel builds using chosen primitive

dod.criterion: 09-execute-projects.md execution loop changed from sequential to wave-based
Parallel builds use the recommended primitive from evaluate-execution-primitives
Reviews stay sequential per task within each wave
Post-wave diff check documented (git diff --name-only vs predicted active_files)
Progress display format documented (Wave N/M: [K tasks, PARALLEL])

tasks.title: Document failure handling for parallel waves

dod.criterion: Failed tasks block dependents only, not entire pipeline
Partial failures within a wave: successful tasks proceed to review, failed tasks marked
Timeout handling: 10min per task, kill process, mark failed, others unaffected
Merge conflict recovery: last-write-wins, review catches inconsistencies
validate-cast.sh checks depends_on references exist (no dangling task IDs)
validate-cast.sh detects circular dependencies
Validation passes when depends_on is absent or empty array
